note: Machine-readable pin of the WSL dev environment. Update in the same commit as CHANGELOG.md whenever anything changes. SHAs are the exact commits built/used.

midnight_infra_versions.proof_server: 8.1.0  (built from midnight-ledger tag ledger-8.1.0, crate midnight-proof-server)
midnight_infra_versions.node: 1.0.0-rc.2+226  (built from midnight-node HEAD; carries res/preprod chain-spec)

wallet_sdk_compose_pins_reference._comment: The wallet SDK's own infra/compose/docker-compose-dynamic.yml pins these ghcr images for its local 'undeployed' devnet. We build source equivalents instead; recorded here for cross-checking compatibility.

build_status.proof_server: BUILT (25M; warms ZK params from srs.midnight.network on first run)

sprint_8_wallet_envelope_adapter._comment: L2 finding (sprint-8-wallet-envelope-live-sync): the adapter's schema needs a real, typed @midnightntwrk/wallet-sdk-abstractions + effect at build/test time. Pinned as real package.json devDependencies (npm registry) -- deliberately the ONLY new devDependencies this sprint adds; the heavier native-binding SDK packages the live/cold-boot tier drives (wallet-sdk-hd, wallet-sdk-unshielded-wallet, @midnight-ntwrk/ledger-v8) are NOT installed here -- they are resolved by absolute path from the sibling midnight-wallet checkout's own node_modules at test:live runtime only (test/integration/live-fixtures/midnight-wallet-sdk-loader.ts). The required Pg-only conformance gate needs neither.

devDependency_pins.@midnightntwrk/wallet-sdk-abstractions: 3.0.0-canary.20260716150734-e744d99 (npm, public registry.npmjs.org -- this exact canary tag's git suffix `e744d99` matches midnight_repos.midnight-wallet's pinned sha `e744d994` above, so the adapter's schema is built against the SAME commit the live/cold-boot tiers drive)
devDependency_pins.effect: 3.22.0 (F9 audit finding: exact-pinned in package.json, replacing the prior ^3.19.19 range -- package-lock.json had already resolved 3.22.0 under that range; this pin makes the realized version explicit rather than implicit, matching @midnightntwrk/wallet-sdk-abstractions' own dependency range, which 3.22.0 satisfies)

sprint_8_wallet_envelope_adapter.live_tier_sdk_resolution: test/integration/live-fixtures/midnight-wallet-sdk-loader.ts dynamically imports hd/unshielded-wallet/abstractions dist + @midnight-ntwrk/ledger-v8's node entry by absolute file:// path from MIDNIGHT_WALLET_REPO (default ~/repos/midnight-wallet); every import() call there uses a computed (non-literal) specifier so tsc treats it as Promise<any> and typechecks cleanly without those packages ever being installed in this repo.
sprint_8_wallet_envelope_adapter.live_run_confirmed: 2026-07-22: both test:live tests passed against public preprod -- preprod-db-sync observed faucet tx b194e71d4d22ed09846cd88aab67c6bb4eec69ea6df5aead3bdb22bfe3493341 (identifiers include 00ea17cf14c2aa1b6bf867d247cb2b8e3ff016444e086451de7aa4e70062a20bea) as a UmbraDB row via PgTransactionHistoryStorage.getAll(); cold-boot-recovery observed the restored wallet's initial progress.appliedId = 505701n (nonzero, proving resume from the snapshot cursor, not genesis).
